ingame_hotkeys:
local caveAntesKamui
local emKamui = false
local tempoLiberado = 0

local TILE_KAMUI = 13870


onTextMessage(function(mode, text)

  if emKamui then return end

  if text:lower():find("voce esta no mundo do kamui") then

    caveAntesKamui =
      storage._configs.cavebot_configs.selected

    CaveBot.setOff()
    storage._configs.cavebot_configs.selected = "saida_kamui"
    CaveBot.setOn()

    emKamui = true
    tempoLiberado = now + 42000
  end

end)


macro(300, function()

  if not emKamui then return end
  if now < tempoLiberado then return end

  local player = g_game.getLocalPlayer()
  if not player then return end

  local tile = g_map.getTile(player:getPosition())
  if not tile then return end

  local ground = tile:getGround()
  if not ground then return end


  if ground:getId() ~= TILE_KAMUI then

    if caveAntesKamui then

      CaveBot.setOff()
      storage._configs.cavebot_configs.selected = caveAntesKamui
      CaveBot.setOn()

    end

    emKamui = false
  end

end)

-- Label
labelcc = UI.Label("Filtro Battle")
labelcc:setFont("verdana-11px-rounded")
labelcc:setColor("orange")

-- UI do Filtro
FiltroIcon = setupUI([[
Panel
  height: 20
  margin-top: 3
  
  Panel
    id: inicio
    anchors.top: parent.top
    anchors.left: parent.left
    margin-left: 0
    width: 200
    height: 20
    font: verdana-11px-rounded
    opacity: 0.80

  BattlePlayers
    id: players
    border: 1 #778899
    anchors.top: parent.top
    anchors.left: parent.left
    margin-left: 27
    image-source: /images/game/battle/battle_players
    !tooltip: tr('Filtrar players.')

  BattleNPCs
    id: npcs
    border: 1 #778899
    anchors.top: parent.top
    anchors.left: prev.left
    margin-left: 30
    image-source: /images/game/battle/battle_npcs
    !tooltip: tr('Filtrar Npcs.')

  BattleMonsters
    id: mobs
    border: 1 #778899
    anchors.top: parent.top
    anchors.left: prev.left
    margin-left: 30
    image-source: /images/game/battle/battle_monsters
    !tooltip: tr('Filtrar mobs.')

  BattleSkulls
    id: sempk
    border: 1 #778899
    anchors.top: parent.top
    anchors.left: prev.left
    margin-left: 30
    image-source: /images/game/battle/battle_skulls
    !tooltip: tr('Filtrar Player sem PK.')

  BattleParty
    id: party
    border: 1 #778899
    anchors.top: parent.top
    anchors.left: prev.left
    margin-left: 30
    image-source: /images/game/battle/battle_party
    !tooltip: tr('Filtrar Membros do Grupo.')
]], panel)

-- Storage
storage.FiltroPlayers = storage.FiltroPlayers or false
storage.FiltroNpcs = storage.FiltroNpcs or false
storage.FiltroMobs = storage.FiltroMobs or false
storage.FiltroSkull = storage.FiltroSkull or false
storage.FiltroParty = storage.FiltroParty or false

-- Atualizaçăo visual dos ícones
macro(100, function()
  FiltroIcon.players:setImageColor(storage.FiltroPlayers and '#696969' or '#FFFFFF')
  FiltroIcon.npcs:setImageColor(storage.FiltroNpcs and '#696969' or '#FFFFFF')
  FiltroIcon.mobs:setImageColor(storage.FiltroMobs and '#696969' or '#FFFFFF')
  FiltroIcon.sempk:setImageColor(storage.FiltroSkull and '#696969' or '#FFFFFF')
  FiltroIcon.party:setImageColor(storage.FiltroParty and '#696969' or '#FFFFFF')
end)

-- Clicks
FiltroIcon.players.onClick = function() storage.FiltroPlayers = not storage.FiltroPlayers end
FiltroIcon.npcs.onClick = function() storage.FiltroNpcs = not storage.FiltroNpcs end
FiltroIcon.mobs.onClick = function() storage.FiltroMobs = not storage.FiltroMobs end
FiltroIcon.sempk.onClick = function() storage.FiltroSkull = not storage.FiltroSkull end
FiltroIcon.party.onClick = function() storage.FiltroParty = not storage.FiltroParty end

-- Macro de controle
FiltrarBattle = macro(1, function() end)

-- Override do filtro da battle
modules.game_battle.doCreatureFitFilters = function(creature)
  if creature:isLocalPlayer() or creature:getHealthPercent() <= 0 then
    return false
  end
  local pos = creature:getPosition()
  if not pos or pos.z ~= posz() or not creature:canBeSeen() then return false end

  if creature:isMonster() and FiltrarBattle.isOn() and storage.FiltroMobs then
    return false
  elseif creature:isPlayer() and FiltrarBattle.isOn() and storage.FiltroPlayers then
    return false
  elseif creature:isNpc() and FiltrarBattle.isOn() and storage.FiltroNpcs then
    return false
  elseif creature:isPlayer() and (creature:getEmblem() == 1 or creature:getShield() == 3 or creature:getShield() == 4) and FiltrarBattle.isOn() and storage.FiltroParty then
    return false
  elseif creature:isPlayer() and creature:getSkull() == 0 and storage.FiltroSkull then
    return false
  end
  return true
end















-- ============================================
-- BugMap v3.1 — Toggle Icon + Performance
-- ============================================

-- ============ REFS LOCAIS (evita lookup global a cada tick) ============
local g_game       = g_game
local g_map        = g_map
local g_keyboard   = modules.corelib.g_keyboard
local consoleModule = modules.game_console
local isKeyPressed = g_keyboard.isKeyPressed
local getTile      = g_map.getTile
local walk         = g_game.walk
local use          = g_game.use
local abs          = math.abs
local floor        = math.floor
local clock        = os.clock

-- ============ ESTADO ============
local lastDev      = { x = 0, y = 0 }
local lastDevTime  = 0
local DEV_MEMORY   = 1.5  -- segundos (já em float, evita *1000 todo tick)

-- ============ DIREÇŐES (array ordenado = mais rápido que hash) ============
local DIRS = {
    { key = 'w', x =  0, y = -5, nx =  0, ny = -1, dash = 0, dv = { dx =  0, dy = -1, s = 8 }, diag = false },
    { key = 'a', x = -5, y =  0, nx = -1, ny =  0, dash = 3, dv = { dx = -1, dy =  0, s = 6 }, diag = false },
    { key = 's', x =  0, y =  5, nx =  0, ny =  1, dash = 2, dv = { dx =  0, dy =  1, s = 8 }, diag = false },
    { key = 'd', x =  5, y =  0, nx =  1, ny =  0, dash = 1, dv = { dx =  1, dy =  0, s = 6 }, diag = false },
    { key = 'e', x =  3, y = -3, nx =  1, ny = -1, dash = nil, dv = nil, diag = true  },
    { key = 'q', x = -3, y = -3, nx = -1, ny = -1, dash = nil, dv = nil, diag = true  },
    { key = 'c', x =  3, y =  3, nx =  1, ny =  1, dash = nil, dv = nil, diag = true  },
    { key = 'z', x = -3, y =  3, nx = -1, ny =  1, dash = nil, dv = nil, diag = true  },
}

-- Offsets perpendiculares pré-calculados por eixo (evita if/else todo tick)
local PERP = {
    ['v'] = { {1, 0}, {-1, 0} },   -- movimento vertical ? escaneia horizontal
    ['h'] = { {0, 1}, {0, -1} },   -- movimento horizontal ? escaneia vertical
    ['d'] = { {1, 0}, {-1, 0}, {0, 1}, {0, -1} }, -- diagonal
}

-- Tabela reutilizável para posiçőes (evita criar tabela nova a cada chamada)
local _pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 }

-- ======================================================
-- CHECAGEM (read-only, zero side effects)
-- ======================================================

local function tileAt(px, py, pz, ox, oy)
    _pos.x = px + ox; _pos.y = py + oy; _pos.z = pz
    return getTile(_pos)
end

local function isUsable(tile)
    if not tile then return false end
    local top = tile:getTopUseThing()
    if not top then return false end
    if top.isBlocking and top:isBlocking() then return false end
    return true
end

local function isWalkable(tile)
    if not tile then return false end
    if tile.isWalkable and not tile:isWalkable() then return false end
    if tile.canShoot and not tile:canShoot() then return false end
    return true
end

local function isObstacle(tile)
    if not tile then return false end
    local blocked = tile.isWalkable and not tile:isWalkable()
    local named = false
    local top = tile:getTopThing()
    if top and top.getName then named = top:getName():len() > 0 end
    local shoot = not tile.canShoot or tile:canShoot()
    return (blocked or named) and shoot
end

--- Dash check (caminho reto livre? ? walk normal)
local function canDash(px, py, pz, dv)
    if not dv then return false end
    local dx, dy, steps = dv.dx, dv.dy, dv.s
    local closestObs, closestWalk = 999, 999
    for i = 1, steps do
        local tile = tileAt(px, py, pz, dx * i, dy * i)
        if tile then
            if isObstacle(tile) then
                if i < closestObs then closestObs = i end
            elseif isWalkable(tile) then
                if i < closestWalk then closestWalk = i end
            end
        end
    end
    if closestWalk == 999 then return false end
    if closestObs == 999 then return true end
    return closestWalk < closestObs
end

-- ======================================================
-- AÇĂO (executa g_game.use)
-- ======================================================

local function useAt(px, py, pz, ox, oy)
    local tile = tileAt(px, py, pz, ox, oy)
    if not tile then return false end
    local top = tile:getTopUseThing()
    if not top then return false end
    if top.isBlocking and top:isBlocking() then return false end
    use(top, 1, { ignoreNonPathable = true, precision = 1 })
    return true
end

local function useAbs(tx, ty, tz)
    _pos.x = tx; _pos.y = ty; _pos.z = tz
    local tile = getTile(_pos)
    if tile and isUsable(tile) then
        use(tile:getTopUseThing())
        return true
    end
    return false
end

-- ======================================================
-- ANTI-OSCILAÇĂO: encontra abertura na parede
-- ======================================================

local function findOpening(px, py, pz, nx, ny)
    local t = clock()
    
    -- Memória: continua no mesmo lado se recente
    if (t - lastDevTime) < DEV_MEMORY and (lastDev.x ~= 0 or lastDev.y ~= 0) then
        local lt = tileAt(px, py, pz, lastDev.x, lastDev.y)
        if lt and isWalkable(lt) then
            return lastDev.x, lastDev.y
        end
    end
    
    -- Determina eixo perpendicular
    local axis = (ny ~= 0 and nx == 0) and 'v' or (nx ~= 0 and ny == 0) and 'h' or 'd'
    local scans = PERP[axis]
    
    local bestX, bestY, bestD = 0, 0, 999
    
    for si = 1, #scans do
        local ox, oy = scans[si][1], scans[si][2]
        for dist = 1, 6 do
            -- Pode andar lateralmente?
            local lt = tileAt(px, py, pz, ox * dist, oy * dist)
            if not lt or not isWalkable(lt) then break end
            -- Desse ponto, o caminho principal abre?
            local ahead = tileAt(px, py, pz, ox * dist + nx, oy * dist + ny)
            if ahead and isUsable(ahead) then
                if dist < bestD then
                    bestX, bestY, bestD = ox, oy, dist
                end
                break
            end
        end
    end
    
    if bestD < 999 then
        lastDev.x, lastDev.y = bestX, bestY
        lastDevTime = t
        return bestX, bestY
    end
    return 0, 0
end

-- ======================================================
-- MOVIMENTO
-- ======================================================

local function moveCardinal(dir, px, py, pz)
    -- 1) Direto
    if useAbs(px + dir.x, py + dir.y, pz) then
        lastDev.x, lastDev.y = 0, 0
        return
    end
    
    -- 2) Procura abertura
    local nx, ny = dir.nx, dir.ny
    local dvx, dvy = findOpening(px, py, pz, nx, ny)
    
    if dvx ~= 0 or dvy ~= 0 then
        -- Diagonal (frente + lateral) em distâncias decrescentes
        for i = 5, 1, -1 do
            if useAbs(px + nx * i + dvx, py + ny * i + dvy, pz) then return end
        end
        -- Slide lateral puro
        for i = 3, 1, -1 do
            if useAbs(px + dvx * i, py + dvy * i, pz) then return end
        end
    end
    
    -- 3) Fallback: distâncias menores reto
    for i = 4, 1, -1 do
        if useAt(px, py, pz, nx * i, ny * i) then return end
    end
end

local function moveDiagonal(dir, px, py, pz)
    local hx, hy = floor(dir.x / 2), floor(dir.y / 2)
    
    -- 1) Destino direto
    if useAbs(px + dir.x, py + dir.y, pz) then
        lastDev.x, lastDev.y = 0, 0
        return
    end
    
    -- 2) Intermediário
    if useAbs(px + hx, py + hy, pz) then return end
    
    -- 3) Abertura lateral
    local dvx, dvy = findOpening(px, py, pz, dir.nx, dir.ny)
    if dvx ~= 0 or dvy ~= 0 then
        if useAbs(px + hx + dvx, py + hy + dvy, pz) then return end
        if useAbs(px + dir.x + dvx, py + dir.y + dvy, pz) then return end
    end
    
    -- 4) Fallback: desvios pequenos do intermediário
    if useAbs(px + hx + 1, py + hy, pz) then return end
    if useAbs(px + hx - 1, py + hy, pz) then return end
    if useAbs(px + hx, py + hy + 1, pz) then return end
    if useAbs(px + hx, py + hy - 1, pz) then return end
end

-- ======================================================
-- MACRO + ÍCONE TOGGLE
-- ======================================================

local bugmapMacro = macro(15, "BugMap", function()
    -- Guards
    if consoleModule and consoleModule.isChatEnabled and consoleModule:isChatEnabled() then return end
    if modules.game_walking and modules.game_walking.wsadWalking == false then return end
    if g_keyboard.isCtrlPressed and g_keyboard:isCtrlPressed() then return end
    
    local p = g_game.getLocalPlayer():getPosition()
    local px, py, pz = p.x, p.y, p.z
    
    for i = 1, #DIRS do
        local dir = DIRS[i]
        if isKeyPressed(dir.key) then
            -- Cardinal: tenta dash (walk normal) primeiro
            if not dir.diag and dir.dash then
                if canDash(px, py, pz, dir.dv) then
                    walk(dir.dash)
                    lastDev.x, lastDev.y = 0, 0
                    return
                end
            end
            -- Bugmap
            if dir.diag then
                moveDiagonal(dir, px, py, pz)
            else
                moveCardinal(dir, px, py, pz)
            end
            return
        end
    end
end)

-- Turn
macro(1, function()
    if consoleModule and consoleModule.isChatEnabled and consoleModule:isChatEnabled() then return end
    if isKeyPressed('W') then turn(0)
    elseif isKeyPressed('S') then turn(2)
    elseif isKeyPressed('A') then turn(3)
    elseif isKeyPressed('D') then turn(1)
    end
end)

-- ============ ÍCONE TOGGLE (estilo CaveBot/TargetBot) ============
local bmIcon = addIcon("bugmapI", {text = "Bug\nMap", switchable = false, moveable = true}, function()
    if bugmapMacro.isOn() then
        bugmapMacro.setOff()
    else
        bugmapMacro.setOn()
    end
end)
bmIcon:setSize({ height = 30, width = 50 })
bmIcon.text:setFont('verdana-11px-rounded')

macro(50, function()
    if bugmapMacro.isOn() then
        bmIcon.text:setColoredText({"BugMap\n", "white", "ON", "green"})
    else
        bmIcon.text:setColoredText({"BugMap\n", "white", "OFF", "red"})
    end
end)

UI.Separator()
